creator: kelly@cbl-skelly3.hs.earthlink.net
text:
Master site fetch for JadeTeX port doesn't work, since
	they've released a new version of JadeTeX.

Fix: Apply patch, below:
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/print/jadetex
	make
	...observe how the port falls back to the FreeBSD distfiles...
        ...and that makes Bill Fenner's script unhappy... :-)
